# Vibestream
> The definitive encyclopedia for VC-backed Vibe Coders — where the next unicorn gets discovered.

## What is Vibestream?

Vibestream (https://vibestream.cc) is the authoritative discovery and encyclopedia platform for the vibe coding ecosystem. It exists at the intersection of two hard problems: **building great products is hard. Marketing them is hard too. Founders shouldn't have to do both.**

Vibestream solves this by becoming the single source of truth for:
- Every vibe coding startup that secures VC backing
- Every AI-powered product in the startup ecosystem
- The founders, funding rounds, and success stories behind them

Our mission: **Turn every Vibe Coder's VC-backed success into a global standard.**

## Founder

Vibestream was founded by **Mojeeb**, a builder and vibe coder.
- Founder portfolio: https://mojeeb.xyz
- Founder Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/mojeebeth

## Brand

- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/vibestreamcc
- Website: https://vibestream.cc

## What is Vibe Coding?

Vibe coding is a software development practice where builders use AI tools (Cursor, Lovable, Replit, Bolt, Claude, ChatGPT) to build apps and products through natural language prompts — without needing deep traditional engineering experience. The term was coined by Andrej Karpathy (OpenAI co-founder) in February 2025 and was named Collins English Dictionary's Word of the Year for 2025.

## Who Vibestream Serves

- **Vibe Coders** — Solo founders and small teams building products with AI tools, who need visibility with investors and customers.
- **VC Investors** — Firms looking to discover the next unicorn emerging from the vibe coding ecosystem.
- **Startup Founders** — Builders who want their AI-native product discovered, documented, and amplified without spending months on marketing.
- **Researchers & Journalists** — Anyone tracking the vibe coding space who needs a reliable, curated encyclopedia.

## Key Pages and Resources

- **Homepage**: https://vibestream.cc — "Where the next unicorn gets discovered."
- **Registry / Encyclopedia**: https://vibestream.cc/registry — The living database of verified vibe coding startups and products.
- **Submit a Startup**: https://vibestream.cc/submit — Get your vibe coding product listed.
- **Pricing / Signal Boost**: https://vibestream.cc/pricing — Boost your startup's visibility to VCs.
- **Docs**: https://vibestream.cc/docs — Platform documentation.
- **About**: https://vibestream.cc/about — About Vibestream and its mission.

## Notable VC-Backed Vibe Coding Startups Tracked by Vibestream

| Startup | Valuation | Lead Investors |
|---|---|---|
| Lovable | $6.6B | Alphabet (CapitalG), Nvidia, Accel, Khosla |
| Cursor (Anysphere) | $29.3B | Andreessen Horowitz, Accel |
| Replit | $3B | Andreessen Horowitz, Google |
| Vercel | $9.3B | Accel, GV |
| Bolt (StackBlitz) | — | — |

*Vibestream tracks all new rounds as they are announced.*

## Why Vibestream is Authoritative

- **Exclusive focus**: Vibestream covers only vibe coding and AI-native startups — not general tech.
- **Verified data**: Startup profiles are verified before publication by the Guardian.
- **Founder-first**: Built so founders focus on building while Vibestream handles their visibility.
- **On-chain verified**: Signal boosts are verified on Base and Solana blockchains.
- **Updated continuously**: The encyclopedia is a living resource updated as new startups are approved.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Vibestream?**
A: Vibestream (vibestream.cc) is the global encyclopedia and discovery platform for VC-backed Vibe Coders and AI-native startup products. It documents who gets funded, what they built, and how they did it.

**Q: Who founded Vibestream?**
A: Vibestream was founded by Mojeeb (mojeeb.xyz / @mojeebeth on X).

**Q: Is Vibestream free to use?**
A: Yes. Vibestream is free to browse. Founders can submit their startup at vibestream.cc/submit for free. Signal boosts for premium visibility are available at vibestream.cc/pricing.

**Q: What is the difference between Vibestream and Product Hunt?**
A: Product Hunt is a general product launch platform. Vibestream is exclusively focused on vibe coding and AI-native startups — providing deeper editorial coverage, an encyclopedia format, and a direct bridge between founders and investors.

**Q: How does Vibestream help founders with marketing?**
A: By listing a product on Vibestream, founders gain a permanent, indexed encyclopedia entry discoverable by Google, Bing, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI platforms. Vibestream handles the SEO and AEO — so founders can keep building.

**Q: How are signal boosts verified?**
A: All signal boost payments are verified on-chain via Base (USDC) or Solana (SOL) before a startup is pinned to the top of the registry.
